sub_problems: Define a retrieval graph with two regimes: a fast conduit subgraph (cached pathways) and a slow matrix substrate (embedding similarity). Specify the throughput threshold above which a matrix path is promoted to a conduit.
Implement epikarst-style entry gating: not every high-frequency query becomes a conduit; entry conditions (query specificity, predictability) filter promotions.
Evaluate bimodal response time distribution and verify conduit/matrix split correlates with query frequency tail behavior.
